name: engineering-workflows
description: Engineering workflow skills for decision mapping, adversarial design review, dependency maintenance, durable terminology, prototyping, building, TDD, diagnosis, architecture, code review, handoffs, and visual artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Map, stress-test, build, diagnose, review, hand off, and visualize work.
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills for breadth-first decision mapping, adversarial design review, dependency maintenance, durable terminology, shared codebase design, disposable prototyping, pragmatic building, disciplined debugging, test-driven development, scoped review lanes, feedback triage, local session handoffs, and temporary visual artifacts. Adapted skills preserve source attribution in Agent Skills frontmatter metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use $engineering-workflows:grill-me to stress-test this approach through adversarial questioning.
Use $engineering-workflows:improve-codebase-architecture to review this codebase architecture.
Use $engineering-workflows:visualize to turn this session into a visual report.
